Recording Wind Instruments

A buyer's guide to microphones for vocals, speech, and instruments

Are you looking for the perfect vocal microphone for your voice – or the ideal way to mic up instruments in your studio? Whether you opt for a large-diaphragm or small-diaphragm microphone, a dynamic or condenser mic, you'll find a huge selection for every possible purpose in the Thomann microphone department. Be it on stage, in the recording studio, or for podcasting, streaming, or reporting: You are guaranteed to find exactly the right microphone for your needs and, of course, the right accessories. With top brands such as Shure, AKG, Beyerdynamic, Sennheiser, Neumann, Audio-Technica, and Rode, as well as our quality in-house brands such as the t.bone, Thomann has microphones for every sound and every budget.

The perfect vocal microphone for every singer

Our vocal microphone department offers a huge selection of microphones for vocals and speech, perfectly calibrated for live performances, professional studio recordings, and everything in between. Dynamic vocal microphones are robust and ideal for the stage; condenser microphones, on the other hand, are capable of capturing every facet of a singer's voice, especially in the studio. Vocal microphones are also great for podcasts and other voice recordings. And don't forget our wide range of lavalier microphones: These tiny microphones can be worn almost invisibly on clothing or headsets and are ideal for interviews, film recordings, and presentations, as well as theatrical productions and musicals.

The perfect microphone for every instrument

Are you looking for the ideal instrument microphone? From complete microphone sets for your drumkit to lightweight clip-on mics for wind instruments, our instrument microphone department has everything you could possibly need. Regardless of whether you're recording in the studio or at home, or looking to professionally reinforce a live performance, we have the optimum solution, from dynamic microphones ideal for even the loudest sound sources to high-quality condenser mics for detailed instrument recordings. Of course, Thomann being Thomann, we even have microphones for more unusual instruments, such as accordions or cajons. And when you need a complete package out of the box, our comprehensive the t. bone Ovid System offers a wide range of practical options, with high-quality special microphones and accessories for a huge number of instruments at a very reasonable price.

Achieve the perfect sound effortlessly with our microphone sets

Not sure which microphones you can use together? With our microphone sets , you'll be ready to go in no time. There are sets for every possible application, all of them comprising a selection of mics that perfectly complement each other. We have complete sets for every kind of instrument, for every budget, and designed specifically for the stage or the recording studio. Usefully, many sets also come with the necessary accessories, such as microphone stands or cables.

From large-diaphragm microphones to boundary microphones – the choice is yours

If you are looking for the perfect microphone for recording vocals and acoustic instruments in the highest quality, be sure to check out our extensive range of large-diaphragm microphones . With their warmth and high-grade resolution, large-diaphragm microphones will enhance both every singer's voice and the natural sound of their band's instruments, especially in the studio. Small-diaphragm microphones are more detailed and responsive, making them the best choice for drums and acoustic instruments, as wells as choirs and other ensembles: With their high sensitivity levels, they can capture even the finest nuances of a performance. Ribbon microphones offer a natural, warm, and intimate sound, and are ideal if you want to give vocals or instruments a smooth, vintage feel. Boundary microphones, on the other hand, are prized for their unadulterated sound – without any room reverb and surface reflections. This makes them ideal for conferences, theatres, orchestras, and choirs, but also in the studio as instrument microphones.

Headset mics and two-way headsets for maximum flexibility

Headset microphones are mounted on a headband or earpiece, offering users maximum freedom of movement: performers in a musical or play, salespeople at a trade fair, comedians doing stand-up – with a headset mic, your hands will remain free so you can focus on your performance. Two-way headsets combine a microphone and headphones, making them the ideal way to communicate in noisy environments or when using intercom systems. They're also the perfect accessory for web conferences or LAN parties.

The best microphones for cameras, podcasts, filming, and radio

Broadcast microphones ensure that speakers and presenters can always be heard clearly and comprehensibly. Thomann offers a huge range here, from inexpensive streaming sets with microphones and accessories to high-quality, large-diaphragm condenser studio microphones. Or perhaps you're looking for a microphone for field reporting, interviews, or live coverage? Our reporter microphones are robust and easy to use: They effectively suppress ambient noise and are capable of delivering perfect results even if the acoustics are less than ideal. Podcasters, too, will want a user-friendly microphone that delivers the best quality without any complicated settings, and Thomann's range of USB/podcast microphones offer you exactly that: Plug-and-play for effortless podcasts, streaming, and indeed any other kind of voice recording. Video and camera microphones , on the other hand, are specially designed for use with cameras and deliver optimum sound and clarity for film and video recordings. From clip-on camera mics and wireless devices to highly sensitive directional microphones, our range ensures you'll always have the right tool to hand, whatever the scenario.

Wireless microphones for unlimited freedom of movement

No cables to tie you up: Wireless microphones offer unlimited freedom of movement, as do our many wireless setups for guitar and bass – not just a relief on stage, but for more flexibility everywhere. Equally, our high-quality wireless systems for cameras make professional videos practically effortless, and we also offer wireless microphone systems specially tailored to conferences and city and museum tours. And if you don't want to part with your favourite microphone – understandably! – you can turn it into a wireless mic with a simple clip-on transmitter.

Stereo microphones, installation microphones, and measuring microphones

Of course, our huge selection also includes stereo microphones for every budget, right through to artificial head systems, which mimic human hearing for ultra-realistic recordings. And our exciting assortment of special microphones includes everything from underwater microphones to 360º mics. If a device is to be used permanently, we have the right installation microphones for every situation, and our measurement microphones are a must for sound engineers, architects, engineers, and in fact anyone who values accurate room and audio analysis. And, of course, every conceivable microphone accessory can also be found somewhere in our extensive range, from microphone stands and cables to original manufacturers' spare parts.

Whether you are a beginner or a pro – our unbeatable range means we always have exactly what you need!

• Top quality and a huge selection in all price ranges – for every user and every budget

• Europe's largest service centre – we'll repair your equipment quickly and professionally right here on site

• Real people to talk to before, during, and after your purchase : The specialists in the Thomann microphone department are always on hand to offer you advice and assistance in person, by e-mail at pa@thomann.de , by phone on +49 (0)9546-9223-35, or via WhatsApp on +49 (0)9546-9223-66

• Risk-free shopping with Thomann's unique customer service package . With our 30-Day Money-Back Guarantee for carefree testing at home, and our 3-year warranty for everything after that, you can always count on us – no ifs, no buts!
